plugin.name: FractalReport
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Tracks Fractal run rewards and reports to channel

trigger.match: ^The gods award you with ([0-9,]+) gold coins\.$
^The gods award you with ([0-9]+) training sessions\.$
^You receive a Fractal Trivia Point Token from the Luminous Fractal\.$

muclient.script:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Colour tables matching SKDReport theme --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local MUSH_COLOR = { white = "white", cyan = "#00D7FF", yellow = "#875FFF", red = "#00FF87", } local AARD_COLOR = { white = "@W", cyan = "@x045", yellow = "@x099", red = "@x048", }
local function BuildLine(segments) local parts, plain, aard = {}, {}, {} for _, seg in ipairs(segments) do table.insert(parts, MUSH_COLOR[seg[1]] or seg[1]) table.insert(parts, "") table.insert(parts, seg[2]) table.insert(plain, seg[2]) table.insert(aard, (AARD_COLOR[seg[1]] or "@W") .. seg[2]) end return parts, table.concat(plain), table.concat(aard) .. "@w" end
local ANOTE_MAP = { ["@x045"] = "#00D7FF", ["@x099"] = "#875FFF", ["@x048"] = "#00FF87", ["@W"] = "white", ["@w"] = "silver", } local function ANote(msg) local args = {} local pos = 1 while pos <= #msg do local code, rest = msg:match("^(@[xX]%d%d%d)(.*)", pos) if not code then code, rest = msg:match("^(@[Ww])(.*)", pos) end if code then local col = ANOTE_MAP[code] or "white" local text = rest:match("^([^@]*)") or "" table.insert(args, col) ; table.insert(args, "") ; table.insert(args, text) pos = pos + #code + #text else local text = msg:match("^([^@]+)", pos) or msg:sub(pos, pos) table.insert(args, "white") ; table.insert(args, "") ; table.insert(args, text) pos = pos + #text end end if #args > 0 then ColourNote(unpack(args)) end end
local COL_HDR = "@x045" local COL_VAL = "@W" local COL_ACC = "@x045" local COL_SEP = "@x099" local COL_GOOD = "@x048" local COL_LBL = "@W" local COL_ITEM = "@x099"
local SEP = COL_SEP .. string.rep("-", 60) .. "@w"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Plugin state - no timing, just reward accumulation per run --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local collecting = false -- true once the first reward line fires local finalizeGen = 0 local pendingGen = 0 local frac_gold = 0 local frac_qp = 0 local frac_trains = 0 local frac_tp = 0
local CHAN_KEY = "fractal_report_channel" local DATA_FILE = GetInfo(66) .. "fractal_runs.txt"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Persistence - every run stored as an entry; totals derived on demand --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local function LoadRuns() local f = io.open(DATA_FILE, "r") if not f then return {} end local raw = f:read("*all") f:close() if not raw or raw == "" then return {} end local fn, err = loadstring("return " .. raw) if not fn then return {} end local ok, t = pcall(fn) if not ok or type(t) ~= "table" then return {} end return t end
local function SaveRuns(runs) local entries = {} for _, r in ipairs(runs) do entries[#entries+1] = string.format( "{gold=%d,qp=%d,trains=%d,tp=%d}", r.gold, r.qp, r.trains, r.tp ) end local f = io.open(DATA_FILE, "w") if not f then return end f:write("{" .. table.concat(entries, ",") .. "}") f:close() end
local function CalcTotals(runs) local t = { runs=0, totalGold=0, totalQP=0, totalTrains=0, totalTP=0 } for _, r in ipairs(runs) do t.runs = t.runs + 1 t.totalGold = t.totalGold + r.gold t.totalQP = t.totalQP + r.qp t.totalTrains = t.totalTrains + r.trains t.totalTP = t.totalTP + r.tp end return t end
local function GetChannel() return GetVariable(CHAN_KEY) or "gt" end
local function ParseNum(s) return tonumber((s:gsub(",", ""))) or 0 end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Finalize: called 1.5s after the last reward line goes quiet --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local function FinalizeRun() collecting = false local runs = LoadRuns() local record = { gold=frac_gold, qp=frac_qp, trains=frac_trains, tp=frac_tp } runs[#runs+1] = record SaveRuns(runs) local runNum = #runs
local segs = { {"cyan", "Fractal"}, {"white", " #"}, {"red", tostring(runNum)}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Gold"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(frac_gold)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "QP"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(frac_qp)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Trains"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(frac_trains)}, {"white", "]"}, } if frac_tp > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "TP"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
local parts, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(GetChannel() .. " " .. aard)
_G._fractal_last = { gold = frac_gold, qp = frac_qp, trains = frac_trains, tp = frac_tp, runNum = runNum, } end
function FractalFinalizeCallback() if collecting and finalizeGen == pendingGen then FinalizeRun() end end
local function ArmFinalize() -- Only called from Fractal-unique lines; can start a new collection window if not collecting then collecting = true finalizeGen = finalizeGen + 1 frac_gold = 0 frac_qp = 0 frac_trains = 0 frac_tp = 0 end pendingGen = finalizeGen DoAfterSpecial(1.5, "FractalFinalizeCallback()", 12) end
local function ArmFinalizePassive() -- Only called from generic lines (QP, trains); only extends an existing window if not collecting then return end pendingGen = finalizeGen DoAfterSpecial(1.5, "FractalFinalizeCallback()", 12) end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Trigger callbacks --------------------------------------------------------------------------- function LootGold(name, line, wildcards) -- "The gods award you with" is Fractal-unique; can initiate collection ArmFinalize() frac_gold = ParseNum(wildcards[1]) end
function LootQuestPoints(name, line, wildcards) -- Generic line; only capture if already inside a Fractal run ArmFinalizePassive() if collecting then frac_qp = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 0 end end
function LootTrains(name, line, wildcards) -- "The gods award you with" is Fractal-unique; can initiate collection ArmFinalize() frac_trains = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 0 end
function LootTP(name, line, wildcards) -- Fractal-unique line; can initiate collection ArmFinalize() frac_tp = 1 end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Alias callbacks --------------------------------------------------------------------------- function SetReportChannel(name, line, wildcards) local chan = wildcards[1]:lower() SetVariable(CHAN_KEY, chan) ANote(COL_HDR .. "[Fractal] " .. COL_LBL .. "Report channel set to: " .. COL_VAL .. chan) end
function SendReport(name, line, wildcards) local chan = (wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1]:lower() or GetChannel() local last = _G._fractal_last if not last then ANote(COL_HDR .. "[Fractal] " .. COL_LBL .. "No completed run to report yet.") return end
local segs = { {"cyan", "Fractal"}, {"white", " #"}, {"red", tostring(last.runNum)}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Gold"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(last.gold)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "QP"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(last.qp)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Trains"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(last.trains)}, {"white", "]"}, } if last.tp > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "TP"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(chan .. " " .. aard) end
function ShowLifetimeStats(name, line, wildcards) local runs = LoadRuns() local stats = CalcTotals(runs) if stats.runs == 0 then ANote(COL_HDR .. "[Fractal] " .. COL_LBL .. "No runs recorded yet.") return end
local chan = (wildcards and wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1]:lower() or GetChannel() local avgGold = string.format("%.0f", stats.totalGold / stats.runs) local avgQP = string.format("%.1f", stats.totalQP / stats.runs) local avgTrains = string.format("%.1f", stats.totalTrains / stats.runs) local tpPct = string.format("%.1f", stats.totalTP / stats.runs * 100)
local segs = { {"cyan", "Fractal Life"}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Runs"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(stats.runs)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Gold"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(stats.totalGold)}, {"white", " avg "}, {"red", avgGold}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "QP"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(stats.totalQP)}, {"white", " avg "}, {"red", avgQP}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Trains"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(stats.totalTrains)}, {"white", " avg "}, {"red", avgTrains}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "TP"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(stats.totalTP)}, {"white", " ("}, {"red", tpPct .. "%"}, {"white", ")]"}, }
local chan = (wildcards and wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1]:lower() or GetChannel()
local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(chan .. " " .. aard) end
function ShowHelp() ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_HDR .. " -=- FRACTAL REPORTER HELP -=-") ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "fractalreportchan <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Set default report channel (e.g. gt, clan, say)") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "fractalreport <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Send last run report to <channel>") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "fractalreportlife <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Send lifetime stats to <channel> (or set channel if omitted)") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "fractalreporthelp" .. COL_LBL .. " - Show this help") ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_LBL .. " Rewards are captured automatically whenever the reward") ANote(COL_LBL .. " lines appear. No start trigger required.") ANote(SEP) end
function OnPluginInstall() ANote(COL_HDR .. "[FractalReport] " .. COL_LBL .. "Loaded. Type " .. COL_ACC .. "fractalreporthelp" .. COL_LBL .. " for commands.") end
function OnPluginEnable() OnPluginInstall() end
